directives.author: Fable (Claude Code)
directives.content: Fable drives the big-picture vision, architectural design, and task assignments. Antigravity drives the local implementation, compilation, testing, and detail polishing.

tasks.title: Establish Fable-Antigravity MCP Coordination Server
tasks.description: Deploy local stdio-based MCP server to coordinate between Claude Code and Antigravity inside the workspace.
log: Initial MCP server deployed and handshake verified.
